name: Unleavened Seed Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Milk or 2 tbsp sweetened condensed milk diluted with 6 tbsp water
1 tsp Vanilla or 1 tsp almond flavoring
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the well-beaten egg yolks, milk (or sweetened condensed milk diluted with water), vanilla or almond flavoring, and mace to the butter mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift together the flour and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture and orange peel to the butter-sugar-egg mixture. Stir until just combined.
5. Carefully fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until fully incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into a well-oiled loaf pan, greasing the sides as needed.
7. Bake in a slow oven (350°F) for about 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing it and serving.
